parameters.sqlQuery:
-- ============================================================
-- CALIDAD DE OFERTA — DOUBLE DATES 5/5
-- Fechas: 2026-04-20 → 2026-05-05
-- Para nueva campaña: actualizar fechas y filtro CONTAINER_NAME
-- ============================================================

WITH

OPTINS AS (
  SELECT
    ITE_ITEM_ID,
    CASE
      WHEN meli_desc > 0                         THEN 'Cofinanciado ML'
      WHEN seller_desc > 0                       THEN 'Solo Seller'
      ELSE                                            'Sin Oferta'
    END AS FINANCIACION,
    CASE
      WHEN CAMPAIGN_TYPE LIKE '%pre_negotiated%' THEN 'Pre-negociada'
      WHEN CAMPAIGN_TYPE LIKE '%TIER_%'          THEN 'Tiers'
      WHEN CAMPAIGN_TYPE LIKE '%smart%'          THEN 'Smart'
      WHEN CAMPAIGN_TYPE LIKE '%dod%'
        OR CAMPAIGN_TYPE LIKE '%lightning%'      THEN 'DOD + Lightning'
      WHEN CAMPAIGN_TYPE LIKE '%custom%'         THEN 'Custom'
      WHEN CAMPAIGN_TYPE IS NOT NULL             THEN 'Otros'
      ELSE                                            'Sin Oferta'
    END AS TIPO_OFERTA,
    ABS(COALESCE(total_desc, 0))                 AS total_desc,
    CASE WHEN UPPER(RIU_GROUP) = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_high
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.BENEFIT_CO_OPTINS_DIA_ITEM`
  WHERE day BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND row_num = 1
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ITE_ITEM_ID ORDER BY day DESC) = 1
),

LK AS (
  SELECT
    ITE_ITEM_ID,
    COALESCE(ITE_SELLER.SEGMENTO_SELLER_DETAIL, 'Sin Segmento') AS SEGMENTO,
    COALESCE(ITE_VERTICAL.DOM_DOMAIN_AGG3,       'Sin AGG3')    AS AGG3,
    COALESCE(ASP_RANGO,                          'Sin Rango')   AS ASP_RANGO
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.LK_ITE_ITEMS_MLA_2025`
  WHERE SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
),

-- Items exhibidos a nivel global (sin deduplicar por container)
EXHIBIDOS_G AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT CAST(IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS AS INT64) AS ITEM_ID
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` C
  INNER JOIN `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.MKP_SM_CONTAINERS_ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS` IE
    ON  IE.DATE = C.DATE
    AND CONCAT('MLA', CAST(IE.CON_CONTAINER_ID AS STRING), '-1') = C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
  WHERE C.CONTAINER_NAME LIKE 'MKP DEMAND 5 5 ABRIL 2026%'
    AND C.DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND C.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS IS NOT NULL
),

-- Items visitados a nivel global
VISITADOS_G AS (
  SELECT VIEWED_ITEM_ID AS ITEM_ID, MAX(COALESCE(GMV_LC_24HS, 0)) AS MAX_GMV
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER`
  WHERE CONTAINER_NAME LIKE 'MKP DEMAND 5 5 ABRIL 2026%'
    AND DATE_EVENT >= DATETIME('2026-04-20')
    AND DATE_EVENT <  DATETIME('2026-05-05 23:59:59')
    AND SITE = 'MLA'
  GROUP BY VIEWED_ITEM_ID
),

-- Steps globales E/V/G para el funnel de Oferta
STEPS_G AS (
  SELECT E.ITEM_ID,
    COALESCE(O.FINANCIACION, 'Sin Oferta') AS FINANCIACION,
    COALESCE(O.TIPO_OFERTA,  'Sin Oferta') AS TIPO_OFERTA,
    O.total_desc, O.is_high, 'E' AS step
  FROM EXHIBIDOS_G E
  LEFT JOIN OPTINS O ON E.ITEM_ID = O.ITE_ITEM_ID
  UNION ALL
  SELECT V.ITEM_ID,
    COALESCE(O.FINANCIACION, 'Sin Oferta'),
    COALESCE(O.TIPO_OFERTA,  'Sin Oferta'),
    O.total_desc, O.is_high, 'V'
  FROM VISITADOS_G V
  LEFT JOIN OPTINS O ON V.ITEM_ID = O.ITE_ITEM_ID
  UNION ALL
  SELECT V.ITEM_ID,
    COALESCE(O.FINANCIACION, 'Sin Oferta'),
    COALESCE(O.TIPO_OFERTA,  'Sin Oferta'),
    O.total_desc, O.is_high, 'G'
  FROM VISITADOS_G V
  LEFT JOIN OPTINS O ON V.ITEM_ID = O.ITE_ITEM_ID
  WHERE V.MAX_GMV > 0
),

-- Items exhibidos por container
EXHIBIDOS_C AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    CAST(IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS AS INT64) AS ITEM_ID,
    C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION` C
  INNER JOIN `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.MKP_SM_CONTAINERS_ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS` IE
    ON  IE.DATE = C.DATE
    AND CONCAT('MLA', CAST(IE.CON_CONTAINER_ID AS STRING), '-1') = C.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
  WHERE C.CONTAINER_NAME LIKE 'MKP DEMAND 5 5 ABRIL 2026%'
    AND C.DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND C.SITE = 'MLA'
    AND IE.ITEMS_EXHIBIDOS IS NOT NULL
),

-- Items visitados por container
VISITADOS_C AS (
  SELECT VIEWED_ITEM_ID AS ITEM_ID, CONTAINER_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    MAX(COALESCE(GMV_LC_24HS, 0)) AS MAX_GMV
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ITEM_CONTAINER`
  WHERE CONTAINER_NAME LIKE 'MKP DEMAND 5 5 ABRIL 2026%'
    AND DATE_EVENT >= DATETIME('2026-04-20')
    AND DATE_EVENT <  DATETIME('2026-05-05 23:59:59')
    AND SITE = 'MLA'
  GROUP BY VIEWED_ITEM_ID, CONTAINER_DEAL_ID
),

-- Steps por container para drill y KPIs
STEPS_C AS (
  SELECT E.ITEM_ID, E.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    COALESCE(O.TIPO_OFERTA,  'Sin Oferta')   AS TIPO_OFERTA,
    COALESCE(O.FINANCIACION, 'Sin Oferta')   AS FINANCIACION,
    COALESCE(LK.SEGMENTO,    'Sin Segmento') AS SEGMENTO,
    COALESCE(LK.AGG3,        'Sin AGG3')     AS AGG3,
    COALESCE(LK.ASP_RANGO,   'Sin Rango')    AS ASP_RANGO,
    O.total_desc, O.is_high, 'E' AS step
  FROM EXHIBIDOS_C E
  LEFT JOIN OPTINS O ON E.ITEM_ID = O.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN LK       ON E.ITEM_ID = LK.ITE_ITEM_ID
  UNION ALL
  SELECT V.ITEM_ID, V.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    COALESCE(O.TIPO_OFERTA,  'Sin Oferta'),
    COALESCE(O.FINANCIACION, 'Sin Oferta'),
    COALESCE(LK.SEGMENTO,    'Sin Segmento'),
    COALESCE(LK.AGG3,        'Sin AGG3'),
    COALESCE(LK.ASP_RANGO,   'Sin Rango'),
    O.total_desc, O.is_high, 'V'
  FROM VISITADOS_C V
  LEFT JOIN OPTINS O ON V.ITEM_ID = O.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN LK       ON V.ITEM_ID = LK.ITE_ITEM_ID
  UNION ALL
  SELECT V.ITEM_ID, V.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    COALESCE(O.TIPO_OFERTA,  'Sin Oferta'),
    COALESCE(O.FINANCIACION, 'Sin Oferta'),
    COALESCE(LK.SEGMENTO,    'Sin Segmento'),
    COALESCE(LK.AGG3,        'Sin AGG3'),
    COALESCE(LK.ASP_RANGO,   'Sin Rango'),
    O.total_desc, O.is_high, 'G'
  FROM VISITADOS_C V
  LEFT JOIN OPTINS O ON V.ITEM_ID = O.ITE_ITEM_ID
  LEFT JOIN LK       ON V.ITEM_ID = LK.ITE_ITEM_ID
  WHERE V.MAX_GMV > 0
),

-- Métricas por etapa del funnel (globales)
STEP_METRICS AS (
  SELECT step,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID)                                                           AS total_items,
    ROUND(AVG(total_desc), 1)                                                         AS avg_disc,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_high=1 THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID)) * 100, 1)                              AS riu_high_pct,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIPO_OFERTA != 'Sin Oferta' THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID)) * 100, 1)                              AS con_oferta_pct
  FROM STEPS_G GROUP BY step
),

FUNNEL_FIN AS (
  SELECT FINANCIACION AS categoria,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS exhibidos,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS visitados,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS gmv_items,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END)) * 100, 2) AS pct_visita,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END)) * 100, 2) AS pct_conv
  FROM STEPS_G GROUP BY FINANCIACION
),

FUNNEL_TIPO AS (
  SELECT TIPO_OFERTA AS categoria,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS exhibidos,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS visitados,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS gmv_items,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END)) * 100, 2) AS pct_visita,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END)) * 100, 2) AS pct_conv
  FROM STEPS_G GROUP BY TIPO_OFERTA
),

TOTALS AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS tot_exhib,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS tot_visit,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS tot_gmv_i
  FROM STEPS_G
),

-- Containers: performance desde DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION
CONT_PERF AS (
  SELECT
    DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_NAME,
    SUM(C_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS SESIONES,
    SUM(TGMV_168HS)        AS NMV,
    SUM(SI_168HS)          AS NSI,
    SUM(BUYERS_168HS)      AS BUYERS,
    SUM(TRANSACTION_168HS) AS TRANSACCIONES
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION`
  WHERE CONTAINER_NAME LIKE 'MKP DEMAND 5 5 ABRIL 2026%'
    AND DATE BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-05'
    AND SITE = 'MLA'
  GROUP BY ALL
),

-- ASP range dominante por container (mayor volumen de visitados)
ASP_DOM AS (
  SELECT DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, ASP_RANGO
  FROM (
    SELECT DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, ASP_RANGO, COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID) AS cnt
    FROM STEPS_C WHERE step='V' GROUP BY 1,2
  )
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DEAL_CONTAINER_ID ORDER BY cnt DESC) = 1
),

-- KPIs de calidad por container
CONT_KPIS AS (
  SELECT DEAL_CONTAINER_ID,
    ROUND(AVG(total_desc), 1) AS DTO_POND,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_high=1 THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT ITEM_ID)) * 100, 1) AS RIU_PCT
  FROM STEPS_C WHERE step='E' GROUP BY DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
),

-- CVR benchmark por rango de ASP (acumulado campaña)
CVR_BENCH AS (
  SELECT ASP_RANGO,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END),
                      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END)) * 100, 2) AS cvr_bench
  FROM STEPS_C GROUP BY ASP_RANGO
),

CONT_FULL AS (
  SELECT P.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, P.CONTAINER_NAME,
    P.SESIONES, P.NMV, P.NSI, P.BUYERS, P.TRANSACCIONES,
    ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(P.TRANSACCIONES, P.SESIONES) * 100, 2) AS CVR,
    COALESCE(A.ASP_RANGO, 'Sin Rango') AS ASP_RANGO,
    COALESCE(K.DTO_POND, 0)            AS DTO_POND,
    COALESCE(K.RIU_PCT,  0)            AS RIU_PCT
  FROM CONT_PERF P
  LEFT JOIN ASP_DOM   A ON P.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID = A.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
  LEFT JOIN CONT_KPIS K ON P.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID = K.DEAL_CONTAINER_ID
),

-- Drill-down por container × dimension
CONT_DRILL AS (
  SELECT DEAL_CONTAINER_ID AS deal_container_id, 'TIPO_OFERTA' AS dimension, TIPO_OFERTA AS categoria,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS exhibidos,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS visitados,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END) AS gmv_items
  FROM STEPS_C GROUP BY 1,2,3
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, 'SEGMENTO', SEGMENTO,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END)
  FROM STEPS_C GROUP BY 1,2,3
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, 'AGG3', AGG3,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='E' THEN ITEM_ID END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='V' THEN ITEM_ID END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN step='G' THEN ITEM_ID END)
  FROM STEPS_C GROUP BY 1,2,3
)

SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"camp_tasa_visita":',
    (SELECT CAST(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(tot_visit, tot_exhib) * 100, 2) AS STRING) FROM TOTALS),
    ',"tot_exhib":',   (SELECT CAST(tot_exhib  AS STRING) FROM TOTALS),
    ',"tot_visit":',   (SELECT CAST(tot_visit  AS STRING) FROM TOTALS),
    ',"tot_gmv_i":',   (SELECT CAST(tot_gmv_i  AS STRING) FROM TOTALS),
    ',"steps":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(step, total_items, avg_disc, riu_high_pct, con_oferta_pct) ORDER BY step)) FROM STEP_METRICS),
    ',"financiacion":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(categoria, exhibidos, visitados, gmv_items, pct_visita, pct_conv) ORDER BY exhibidos DESC)) FROM FUNNEL_FIN),
    ',"tipo_oferta":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(categoria, exhibidos, visitados, gmv_items, pct_visita, pct_conv) ORDER BY exhibidos DESC)) FROM FUNNEL_TIPO),
    ',"bench":{',
    (SELECT COALESCE(STRING_AGG(CONCAT('"', REPLACE(ASP_RANGO, '"', ''), '":', CAST(COALESCE(cvr_bench, 0) AS STRING)), ','), '') FROM CVR_BENCH),
    '},"containers":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(DEAL_CONTAINER_ID, CONTAINER_NAME, SESIONES, NMV, NSI, BUYERS, TRANSACCIONES, CVR, ASP_RANGO, DTO_POND, RIU_PCT) ORDER BY NMV DESC)) FROM CONT_FULL),
    ',"drill":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(deal_container_id, dimension, categoria, exhibidos, visitados, gmv_items))) FROM CONT_DRILL),
    ',"container_groups":{"MLA1587833-1":"FOCO","MLA1593960-1":"FOCO","MLA1587835-1":"FOCO","MLA1587824-1":"FOCO","MLA1587826-1":"FOCO","MLA1587827-1":"FOCO","MLA1587829-1":"FOCO","MLA1587820-1":"FOCO","MLA1593102-1":"FOCO","MLA1597617-1":"FOCO","MLA1597616-1":"FOCO","MLA1585322-1":"FOCO","MLA1587823-1":"FOCO","MLA1587821-1":"FOCO","MLA1593114-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587855-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587853-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587847-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587861-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587846-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587850-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587836-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587845-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587843-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587852-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1587839-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1593998-1":"NO FOCO","MLA1594868-1":"TACTICO","MLA1587867-1":"TACTICO","MLA1594869-1":"TACTICO","MLA1587863-1":"TACTICO","MLA1587857-1":"TACTICO"}',
    ',"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
